attributes.description: **Company Overview ** Steel Strips Wheels Ltd was incorporated in 1985 and started its operations in 1991. It designs, manufactures, and supplies Steel Wheel Rims and Alloy Wheels for a wide range of domestic and global automobile makers. It is Headquarter in Chandigarh. [1]
